title: How to Play ZXBrick
seoTitle: How to Play ZXBrick | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to play ZXBrick, destroy every brick, complete levels, collect power-ups, and improve your arcade skills.
summary: Master the basics of ZXBrick and discover how to progress through all 100 handcrafted levels.

sections.heading: Your Objective
paragraphs: Your goal is to destroy every brick while keeping the ball in play.
Complete each level, collect helpful power-ups, and continue progressing through all 100 handcrafted stages.

sections.heading: How a Game Works
paragraphs: Every game begins with a fresh level and continues until all bricks have been cleared or you run out of lives.
As you progress, levels become more challenging, rewarding accurate paddle control, good reactions, and smart use of power-ups.
bullets: Complete the level and move on to the next challenge.

sections.heading: Keep Improving
paragraphs: Every game is another opportunity to improve your reactions, beat your highest score, and unlock new achievements.
As you continue playing, you'll also earn BarkinMad Coins and climb the leaderboards alongside other ZXBrick players.

images.caption: Destroy every brick and complete each level.

featureShowcases.heading: Start Your First Game
featureShowcases.summary: Everything you need to know before launching your first ZXBrick session.
body: ZXBrick is easy to learn but rewarding to master. Begin by learning how to control the paddle, keep the ball in play, and clear every brick on the screen.
As your confidence grows, you'll naturally progress through more difficult levels, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores.
bullets: Begin your journey through all 100 levels.

image.caption: Everything you need to begin playing ZXBrick.
